title: Industria
description: A decently heavyweight modpack focused on realism and automation.
body:
Industria is decently heavyweight modpack focused on realism, automation, and exploration.

It makes use of mods such as [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), and more, along with various structure and world-gen mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify), [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), etcetera. Industria also includes a large array of additional optimization mods to create a smooth experience and make your game not look like a PowerPoint presentation.

## Features
- New revamped villages and structures.
- Optimization.
- Brand new decorational items.
- New biomes.
- Bug fixes.
- Fully revamped End and Nether dimensions.
- New ambient and interactive sound effects.
- Smooth animations and scrolling.
- New bosses.
- Shaders.
- Brand new technology and redstone additions.
- Seasons.
- Brand new food items and consumables.
- Draggable lists.
- All mob vote mobs.
- Revamped inventory storage with backpacks.
- Dynamic lights
- Space exploration.
- Faster boot time.
- Model gap fix.
- Mob variants.
- QOL features.
- Snow under trees.
- Brand new mobs.
- New visual particle effects.
- So many new structures.
- Way too many items.
- Cats vibing to music discs.
- More music discs.
- Minimap.
- Item drop physics.
- Waystones.
- And so much more!

## FAQ
Q: Will Industria ever be available for a Minecraft version before / after 1.20.1?\
A: Probably not, as it's a pretty big modpack with ~300 mods.

Q: Forge?\
A: No.

Q: Can my PC run this modpack?\
A: I'm not very sure as to the exact minimum specs, but my PC with an NVIDIA GTX 1660 Ti, an Intel Xeon E5-2670, and 16 gigabytes of DDR3 RAM runs it decently good at around 50 - 60 FPS, albeit with its fair share of lag spikes every few minutes where it'll drop to around 10 FPS. The result is the mostly same with or without shaders, although this could be very different on other PCs.

**NOTE**: Recommended to allocate at least 4 - 5 GB of RAM.

## Other Projects
- [Immersivity](https://modrinth.com/modpack/immersivity)
- [Luminary](https://modrinth.com/modpack/luminary)
- [OptiVive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optivive)
